description: Tokyo cultural source batch seeded from purple art markers in the shared Google My Maps export. First active batch keeps to Tokyo museums and galleries with official crawl-ready exhibition or event pages; cinemas, restaurants, outside-Tokyo markers, and venue-only/permanent attractions stay out until classified.

sources.name: 21_21 DESIGN SIGHT
sources.notes: Purple art marker from Google My Maps. Use Gallery 1 & 2 program and Gallery 3 listing pages; source-specific extractor reads current/upcoming links and detail Title/Date rows. Japanese site omits the /en/ prefix.

qa.language_url_pattern: English uses /en/ before program/gallery3; Japanese omits that prefix.

field_sources.listing_links: current/upcoming cards on Gallery 1 & 2 program plus Gallery 3 pages
field_sources.title: detail Title row

qa.image_rules: Use topweb image only; skips generic header/flyer media and keeps one exhibition image.

sources.name: Artizon Museum
sources.notes: Purple art marker from Google My Maps.

qa.image_rules: Use artwork-list contain images; skip flyer/hero image.

sources.name: ATELIER MUJI GINZA
sources.notes: Purple art marker from Google My Maps. Japanese-first source; direct HTTP can rate-limit.

sources.name: ginza graphic gallery
sources.notes: Purple art marker from Google My Maps. Tokyo GGG uses schedule CGI pages with t=1; l=2 is English and l=1 is Japanese.

qa.language_url_pattern: DNP schedule CGI uses l=1 for Japanese and l=2 for English.
qa.image_rules: DNP schedule extractor stores only first image.

sources.name: Mori Art Museum
sources.notes: Purple art marker from Google My Maps. Exhibition pages keep body copy and artwork images in content-main; ignore the top flyer/banner image.

qa.image_rules: Use content images only; skip flyer/banner image.

sources.name: STANDING PINE Tokyo

sources.notes: Official STANDING PINE exhibitions page. English listing/detail pages; source-specific extractor reads left-column title/date rows and trims artist names after the pipe.

qa.image_rules: Use right-column detail images and content images; source-specific extractor trims artist names after pipe.

qa.image_rules: Use only #resizeimage img; skip nav/upcoming/past/info links.
